testCases.scenario: AC1: Fill the signup form and register as a new user
testCases.testCase: Submit step-1 + step-2 form data and confirm the server accepts the registration
testCases.preCondition: Browser open at https://moontower.aiimone.com/signup; step-1 form 'Register Your Restaurant' is visible; Next button is enabled
testSteps: Fill Restaurant Name with a unique timestamp-suffixed value
Fill Full Name, Business Email, Phone Number
Check 'I agree to the Terms and Conditions'
testCases.testData:
Restaurant Name: MoonTest<timestamp>
Full Name: Arslan Tester
Email: arslan.moon+ac1<timestamp>@yopmail.com
Phone: 5555550199
Password: TestPass!2025
testCases.expectedResult: Form is accepted; URL leaves /signup (no validation errors); the app navigates the user away from the signup screen
testCases.postCondition: A new restaurant tenant exists on the server with the unique restaurant name; the user is on the post-signup flow
testCases.linkedTestTitle: AC1 — fills both steps and the app accepts the registration (URL leaves /signup)

testCases.scenario: AC2: Verify the user is registered
testCases.testCase: After Create Account, confirm three independent post-registration signals all hold
testCases.preCondition: Browser open at https://moontower.aiimone.com/signup; step-1 form visible
testSteps: Fill all step-1 required fields with valid data
Verify 'Select Your Location' heading is visible
Verify the 'Restaurant: <run-specific name>' paragraph is visible
testCases.testData:
Restaurant Name: MoonVerify<timestamp>
Full Name: Arslan Verify
Email: arslan.moon+ac2<timestamp>@yopmail.com
Phone: 5555550199
Password: TestPass!2025
testCases.expectedResult: All three signals hold simultaneously: URL = /select-location; 'Select Your Location' heading visible; 'Restaurant: <run-specific name>' paragraph confirms the exact account just created
testCases.postCondition: Registration is confirmed end-to-end; user can now choose a location to manage
testCases.linkedTestTitle: AC2 — after Create Account, the app surfaces the post-registration screen referencing the new restaurant
